gap.sentence: The eccentric professor wore mismatched socks and talked to his plants every morning.
gap.ja: その風変わりな教授は左右違う靴下をはき、毎朝植物に話しかけていた。

gap.sentence: Bees pollinate flowers as they collect nectar, helping plants reproduce.
gap.ja: ミツバチは蜜を集めながら花を受粉させ、植物の繁殖を助ける。

gap.sentence: She surreptitiously passed a note to her friend during the boring lecture.
gap.ja: 退屈な講義中、彼女はこっそりと友人にメモを手渡した。

gap.sentence: She carefully planned her itinerary to include all the historical sites she wanted to visit.
gap.ja: 彼女は訪れたいすべての史跡を含めるよう、旅程を慎重に計画した。

gap.sentence: The sudden resignation of the president threw the company into complete turmoil.
gap.ja: 社長の突然の辞任で、会社は完全な混乱状態に陥った。

dict.text: I can't wait until I'm old enough to start green magic.
She blinked very fast and dug her spade furiously in the soil.
Plants lay mutilated on the floor, their pots shattered and leaves shredded.
